commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=5ff9dbc8fc4ab51a3d644bc46e9cc7c2c9edd281)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an age-only fallback to `pruneDiagnosticSessionStates` so stale diagnostic session entries are deleted after the existing TTL even when they are not idle or still have queue depth.

PR surface: Source +4. Total +4 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: failed recovery outcomes can leave non-mutated diagnostic state behind, while current pruning only deletes idle empty entries. I did not run a live gateway reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor revision and real behavior proof; automation should not take over while the proof gate and session-state recovery design are unresolved.

target.title: fix(logging): prune non-idle stale diagnostic session entries
target.author: dwc1997

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
